name: NMEA2000_TWAI
description: NMEA2000 CAN driver for ESP32 (possibly all variants, tested on C3) using the ESP-IDF TWAI peripheral directly. Drop-in replacement for ttlappalainen/NMEA2000_esp32 that compiles on ESP32-C3/C6/S3 (the original NMEA2000_esp32 includes Xtensa-only soc/dport_reg.h and will not build for RISC-V targets). Provides sleep/wake helpers for low-power applications and bus-off recovery.
keywords: nmea2000, can, twai, esp32, esp32-c3, esp32-c6, esp32-s3, marine, n2k
